definition: To transmit a program or information by radio or television.
definitionHe: לשדר תוכנית או מידע ברדיו או בטלוויזיה.
examples: The news is broadcast live every evening.
They broadcast the concert on national television.
The speech was broadcast to millions of viewers.

commonMistakes.explanation: הפועל broadcast לא משתנה בעבר - broadcast ולא broadcasted.

tip: Unlike most verbs, 'broadcast' doesn't change in past tense: broadcast → broadcast (not broadcasted).
tipHe: בניגוד לרוב הפעלים, broadcast לא משתנה בזמן עבר: broadcast → broadcast (לא broadcasted).

definition: The activity or profession of writing for newspapers, magazines, or news websites.
definitionHe: הפעילות או המקצוע של כתיבה לעיתונים, מגזינים או אתרי חדשות.
examples: She studied journalism at university.
Journalism plays a vital role in democracy.
Investigative journalism uncovered the scandal.

commonMistakes.explanation: journalism היא מילה לא-ספירה, לא אומרים the journalism כשמדברים על התחום באופן כללי.

tip: 'Journalism' is uncountable when referring to the field. Don't use 'the' before it in general statements.
tipHe: journalism היא מילה לא-ספירה כשמתייחסים לתחום. לא משתמשים ב-the לפניה במשפטים כלליים.

definition: The title of a newspaper article printed in large letters.
definitionHe: הכותרת של כתבה בעיתון, מודפסת באותיות גדולות.
examples: The headline grabbed everyone's attention.
She made headlines when she won the award.
The newspaper headline was misleading.

commonMistakes.wrong: Did you read the headline news?
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים see/read the headlines ולא headline news (שזה יותר שם של תוכנית).

tip: 'Headlines' in plural often means the main news stories. 'Make headlines' means to become big news.
tipHe: headlines ברבים פירושו חדשות מרכזיות. make headlines פירושו להפוך לחדשה גדולה.

definition: A newspaper article that expresses the editor's opinion on a topic.
definitionHe: מאמר בעיתון שמביע את דעת העורך בנושא מסוים.
examples: The editorial criticized the government's policy.
She wrote an editorial about climate change.
The editorial sparked a heated debate.

commonMistakes.explanation: editorial כשם עצם כבר מתייחס למאמר, לא צריך להוסיף article.

tip: As a noun, 'editorial' already means an opinion article. As an adjective, it relates to editing: 'editorial decision'.
tipHe: כשם עצם, editorial כבר אומר מאמר דעה. כתואר, הוא מתייחס לעריכה: editorial decision.

definition: The reporting of news and events by the media.
definitionHe: דיווח על חדשות ואירועים על ידי התקשורת.
examples: The media coverage of the election was extensive.
Live coverage of the event began at 8 PM.
The scandal received widespread coverage.

commonMistakes.wrong: The coverage of the event were good
commonMistakes.correct: The coverage of the event was good
commonMistakes.explanation: coverage היא מילה יחידנית (לא-ספירה), לכן הפועל צריך להיות was ולא were.

tip: 'Coverage' is uncountable - always singular. You can't say 'coverages' or use 'were' with it.
tipHe: coverage היא מילה לא-ספירה - תמיד ביחיד. אי אפשר לומר coverages או להשתמש עם were.

definition: The group of people who watch, listen to, or read something.
definitionHe: קבוצת האנשים שצופים, מאזינים או קוראים משהו.
examples: The audience applauded at the end of the show.
The TV show attracted a large audience.
The speaker engaged the audience with humor.

commonMistakes.explanation: בדרך כלל audience מתנהגת כיחידנית באנגלית אמריקאית. משתמשים ב-large ולא ב-big לתיאור גודל קהל.

tip: In American English, 'audience' usually takes a singular verb. Use 'large' rather than 'big' for formal contexts.
tipHe: באנגלית אמריקאית, audience בדרך כלל לוקחת פועל ביחיד. משתמשים ב-large ולא ב-big בהקשרים רשמיים.

definition: A journalist who reports news from a particular place or on a particular topic.
definitionHe: עיתונאי שמדווח חדשות ממקום מסוים או על נושא מסוים.
examples: Our correspondent in London has the latest update.
She works as a foreign correspondent.
The war correspondent risked his life for the story.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: correspondent עם e ולא a לפני nt.

tip: Don't confuse the spelling: it's 'correspondent' (not 'correspondant'). It comes from 'correspond'.
tipHe: אל תבלבל באיות: correspondent עם e ולא correspondant. המילה באה מ-correspond.

definition: A film or TV program that gives facts about a real subject.
definitionHe: סרט או תוכנית טלוויזיה שמציגים עובדות על נושא אמיתי.
examples: We watched a documentary about ocean pollution.
The documentary won several awards.
She directed a documentary on homelessness.

commonMistakes.explanation: documentary כבר מתייחס לסוג של סרט, לא צריך להוסיף movie אחרי.

tip: 'Documentary' alone is enough - no need to say 'documentary movie'. You can say 'documentary film' in formal contexts.
tipHe: documentary לבד מספיק - אין צורך לומר documentary movie. אפשר לומר documentary film בהקשרים רשמיים.

definition: To arrange to receive something regularly, especially a publication or service.
definitionHe: לסדר קבלה של משהו באופן קבוע, בעיקר פרסום או שירות.
examples: I subscribed to the magazine last month.
Subscribe to our channel for more content.
She subscribes to several streaming services.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים subscribe to ולא subscribe on.

tip: Always use 'subscribe to' (not 'subscribe on/for'). The noun form is 'subscription'.
tipHe: תמיד אומרים subscribe to (לא subscribe on/for). צורת שם העצם היא subscription.

definition: To make content available to the public, especially in print or online.
definitionHe: להפוך תוכן לזמין לציבור, בעיקר בדפוס או באינטרנט.
examples: The author published her first novel last year.
The findings were published in a scientific journal.
He publishes a blog about technology.

commonMistakes.correct: The book has been published since 2020
commonMistakes.explanation: עם since משתמשים בזמן present perfect (has been published) ולא past simple.

tip: With 'since', use present perfect: 'has been published since 2020' (not 'was published since 2020').
tipHe: עם since משתמשים ב-present perfect: has been published since 2020 (לא was published since 2020).

definition: To examine and suppress material considered offensive or a threat.
definitionHe: לבדוק ולהסיר חומר שנחשב פוגעני או מאיים.
examples: The government censored the news report.
Several scenes were censored from the film.
They censor content that violates their guidelines.

commonMistakes.wrong: The movie was censured by the government
commonMistakes.correct: The movie was censored by the government
commonMistakes.explanation: censor = לצנזר, censure = לגנות. אלו שתי מילים שונות!

tip: Don't confuse 'censor' (suppress content) with 'censure' (express strong disapproval). They sound similar but differ.
tipHe: אל תבלבל בין censor (לצנזר תוכן) לבין censure (לגנות). הם נשמעים דומה אבל שונים.

definition: Recorded film or video material.
definitionHe: חומר סרט או וידאו מוקלט.
examples: Security footage showed the suspect entering the building.
The news showed dramatic footage of the storm.
They reviewed hours of footage from the event.

commonMistakes.correct: The police found a lot of footage
commonMistakes.explanation: footage היא מילה לא-ספירה - אין לה צורת רבים. אומרים a lot of footage.

tip: 'Footage' is uncountable - never 'footages'. Say 'a lot of footage' or 'pieces of footage'.
tipHe: footage היא מילה לא-ספירה - אף פעם לא footages. אומרים a lot of footage או pieces of footage.

definition: A journalist who writes a regular column in a newspaper or magazine.
definitionHe: עיתונאי שכותב טור קבוע בעיתון או מגזין.
examples: She is a well-known political columnist.
The columnist criticized the new law.
He has been a columnist for the paper for ten years.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: columnist עם ist בסוף, והאות n שקטה ב-column.

tip: The 'n' in 'column' is silent. The word comes from Latin 'columna'. Remember: column → columnist.
tipHe: ה-n ב-column שקטה. המילה באה מלטינית columna. זכרו: column → columnist.

definition: Considered normal and accepted by most people in a society.
definitionHe: נחשב רגיל ומקובל על רוב האנשים בחברה.
examples: The idea has entered mainstream thinking.
Mainstream media often ignores small communities.
The band went from underground to mainstream.

commonMistakes.explanation: mainstream הוא תואר ולא שם עצם ספיר - אומרים it's very mainstream ולא a mainstream.

tip: 'Mainstream' as an adjective doesn't need 'a'. Say 'it's very mainstream' or 'mainstream culture'.
tipHe: mainstream כתואר לא צריך a. אומרים it's very mainstream או mainstream culture.

definition: Information used to promote a political cause or point of view, often misleading.
definitionHe: מידע המשמש לקידום מטרה פוליטית או נקודת מבט, לעתים מטעה.
examples: The regime spread propaganda through state media.
War propaganda influenced public opinion.
She studied the effects of propaganda on society.

commonMistakes.correct: They spread a lot of propaganda
commonMistakes.explanation: propaganda היא מילה לא-ספירה, לא אומרים propagandas. גם משתמשים ב-spread ולא ב-make.

tip: 'Propaganda' is uncountable (no plural). Use 'spread propaganda' rather than 'make propaganda'.
tipHe: propaganda היא מילה לא-ספירה (אין רבים). אומרים spread propaganda ולא make propaganda.

definition: A system of government in which people vote to choose their leaders.
definitionHe: שיטת ממשל שבה העם בוחר את מנהיגיו בהצבעה.
examples: Democracy allows citizens to have a voice.
The country transitioned to democracy in 1990.
Free elections are essential to democracy.

commonMistakes.explanation: כשמדברים על דמוקרטיה כמושג כללי, לא משתמשים ב-the.

tip: When talking about democracy as a general concept, don't use 'the'. Use 'the' only for specific democracies.
tipHe: כשמדברים על דמוקרטיה כמושג כללי, לא משתמשים ב-the. משתמשים ב-the רק לדמוקרטיות ספציפיות.

definition: The group of elected representatives who make laws in a country.
definitionHe: קבוצת הנציגים הנבחרים שמחוקקים חוקים במדינה.
examples: Parliament voted on the new law yesterday.
She was elected to parliament last year.
The bill was debated in parliament for weeks.

commonMistakes.wrong: He is a member in the parliament
commonMistakes.correct: He is a member of parliament
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים member of parliament ולא member in the parliament.

tip: 'Member of Parliament' (MP) is the correct phrase. No 'the' is needed before 'parliament' in this expression.
tipHe: member of Parliament (MP) הוא הביטוי הנכון. אין צורך ב-the לפני parliament בביטוי הזה.

definition: Laws considered collectively; the process of making laws.
definitionHe: חוקים כמכלול; התהליך של חקיקת חוקים.
examples: New legislation was introduced to protect workers.
The legislation passed with a large majority.
Environmental legislation has become stricter.

commonMistakes.wrong: The government passed a new legislation
commonMistakes.explanation: legislation היא מילה לא-ספירה - לא אומרים a legislation. אומרים a piece of legislation.

tip: 'Legislation' is uncountable. Say 'new legislation' or 'a piece of legislation' (not 'a legislation').
tipHe: legislation היא מילה לא-ספירה. אומרים new legislation או a piece of legislation (לא a legislation).

definition: An organized course of action to achieve a particular goal.
definitionHe: מהלך מאורגן של פעולות להשגת מטרה מסוימת.
examples: The election campaign lasted three months.
She launched a campaign against poverty.
The advertising campaign was very successful.

commonMistakes.wrong: He did a campaign for president
commonMistakes.correct: He ran a campaign for president
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים run a campaign ולא do/make a campaign.

tip: Use 'run a campaign' or 'launch a campaign' (not 'do' or 'make' a campaign).
tipHe: אומרים run a campaign או launch a campaign (לא do או make a campaign).

definition: A person who represents their country in negotiations with other nations.
definitionHe: אדם שמייצג את מדינתו במשאים ומתנים עם מדינות אחרות.
examples: The diplomat negotiated a peace agreement.
She served as a diplomat in several countries.
The diplomat was recalled after the incident.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים work as + מקצוע, לא work like.

tip: Use 'work as' (not 'work like') when describing someone's job: 'He works as a diplomat'.
tipHe: אומרים work as (לא work like) כשמתארים מקצוע: He works as a diplomat.

definition: The fundamental principles by which a state is governed.
definitionHe: העקרונות הבסיסיים שלפיהם מדינה מתנהלת.
examples: The constitution guarantees freedom of speech.
They amended the constitution last year.
The Supreme Court interprets the constitution.

commonMistakes.explanation: according תמיד בא עם to - according to ולא according לבד.

tip: Always 'according to' (never 'according' alone). This is a very common error for Hebrew speakers.
tipHe: תמיד according to (אף פעם לא according לבד). זו טעות נפוצה מאוד בקרב דוברי עברית.

definition: A change or addition to a law, constitution, or document.
definitionHe: שינוי או תוספת לחוק, חוקה או מסמך.
examples: The First Amendment protects free speech.
They proposed an amendment to the bill.
The amendment was ratified by all states.

commonMistakes.wrong: They made an amendement to the law
commonMistakes.correct: They made an amendment to the law
commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: amendment ולא amendement (אין e אחרי d).

tip: Watch the spelling: 'amendment' (not 'amendement'). It comes from 'amend' + '-ment'.
tipHe: שימו לב לאיות: amendment (לא amendement). המילה באה מ-amend + -ment.

definition: The main political party opposing the government; resistance to something.
definitionHe: המפלגה הפוליטית העיקרית שמתנגדת לממשלה; התנגדות למשהו.
examples: The opposition criticized the new policy.
There was strong opposition to the plan.
The leader of the opposition gave a speech.

commonMistakes.wrong: He is in the opposition to the plan
commonMistakes.correct: He is in opposition to the plan
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים in opposition to (ללא the) כשמדברים על התנגדות לרעיון.

tip: Use 'in opposition to' (without 'the') when expressing disagreement with an idea or plan.
tipHe: אומרים in opposition to (ללא the) כשמביעים אי הסכמה עם רעיון או תוכנית.

definition: A vote in which all eligible people can decide on an important issue.
definitionHe: הצבעה שבה כל מי שזכאי יכול להחליט בנושא חשוב.
examples: The referendum on independence attracted high voter turnout.
They held a referendum on EU membership.
The result of the referendum surprised many.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב: 1) referendum ולא referandum (שני e). 2) אומרים hold a referendum ולא make.

tip: Spelling: 'referendum' (not 'referandum'). Use 'hold a referendum' (not 'make'). Plural: 'referendums' or 'referenda'.
tipHe: איות: referendum (לא referandum). אומרים hold a referendum (לא make). רבים: referendums או referenda.

definition: Supreme power or authority of a state to govern itself.
definitionHe: הסמכות או הכוח העליון של מדינה לשלוט בעצמה.
examples: The country fought to maintain its sovereignty.
National sovereignty is a key principle in international law.
Sovereignty over the territory was disputed.

commonMistakes.wrong: The country wants to keep their sovereignty
commonMistakes.correct: The country wants to keep its sovereignty
commonMistakes.explanation: country הוא יחיד, לכן הכינוי הוא its ולא their.

tip: A country is singular, so use 'its sovereignty' (not 'their'). This applies to all singular nouns.
tipHe: country הוא יחיד, לכן אומרים its sovereignty (לא their). זה חל על כל שמות עצם ביחיד.

definition: A system of government with many complicated rules and processes.
definitionHe: מערכת ממשל עם כללים ותהליכים מורכבים רבים.
examples: The bureaucracy slowed down the approval process.
She was frustrated by the government bureaucracy.
Reducing bureaucracy would help small businesses.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: bureaucracy ולא bureaucraty - מסתיים ב-cracy.

tip: Tricky spelling: 'bureaucracy' ends in '-cracy' (like democracy). Remember: bureau + cracy.
tipHe: איות מורכב: bureaucracy מסתיים ב-cracy (כמו democracy). זכרו: bureau + cracy.

definition: A temporary alliance of different parties for joint action.
definitionHe: ברית זמנית של מפלגות שונות לפעולה משותפת.
examples: The coalition government includes three parties.
They formed a coalition to pass the law.
The coalition collapsed after disagreements.

commonMistakes.explanation: הפועל build הוא לא רגיל: build-built-built. בהקשר פוליטי אומרים form a coalition.

tip: 'Build' is irregular: build-built-built. In politics, 'form a coalition' is more natural than 'build'.
tipHe: build הוא פועל לא רגיל: build-built-built. בפוליטיקה, form a coalition טבעי יותר מ-build.

definition: An official penalty or restriction imposed on a country or individual.
definitionHe: עונש רשמי או הגבלה שמוטלים על מדינה או יחיד.
examples: Economic sanctions were imposed on the country.
The UN lifted the sanctions after negotiations.
Trade sanctions hurt the economy.

commonMistakes.wrong: They put sanctions on the country
commonMistakes.correct: They imposed sanctions on the country
commonMistakes.explanation: בהקשר רשמי אומרים impose sanctions ולא put sanctions.

tip: In formal English, use 'impose sanctions' (not 'put sanctions'). Also: 'lift sanctions' means to remove them.
tipHe: באנגלית רשמית אומרים impose sanctions (לא put sanctions). lift sanctions = להסיר סנקציות.

definition: A government, especially one that is strict or authoritarian.
definitionHe: ממשלה, במיוחד כזו שהיא נוקשה או סמכותנית.
examples: The regime suppressed political opposition.
The military regime lasted for two decades.
The old regime was overthrown in a revolution.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים regime change כביטוי. לא אומרים the regime was changed (פסיבי).

tip: 'Regime change' is a set phrase. The noun 'regime' often has negative connotations in English.
tipHe: regime change הוא ביטוי קבוע. שם העצם regime לעתים קרובות נושא קונוטציות שליליות באנגלית.

definition: A set of beliefs or principles, especially political ones.
definitionHe: מערכת של אמונות או עקרונות, במיוחד פוליטיים.
examples: Political ideology shapes how people vote.
The party's ideology appeals to young voters.
They have very different ideologies.

commonMistakes.explanation: כשמדברים על אידאולוגיות של כמה אנשים, צריך רבים: ideologies are.

tip: 'Ideology' is countable - plural is 'ideologies'. Use singular verb with one ideology, plural with many.
tipHe: ideology היא מילה ספירה - הרבים הוא ideologies. פועל יחיד עם אידאולוגיה אחת, רבים עם כמה.

definition: A proposed explanation for something that can be tested.
definitionHe: הסבר מוצע למשהו שניתן לבדוק.
examples: The scientist tested her hypothesis in the lab.
Our hypothesis was confirmed by the results.
They formed a hypothesis before the experiment.

commonMistakes.explanation: hypothesis הוא יחיד. הרבים הוא hypotheses (כמו ביוונית).

tip: Singular: 'hypothesis'. Plural: 'hypotheses' (from Greek). This is a commonly tested distinction.
tipHe: יחיד: hypothesis. רבים: hypotheses (מיוונית). זהו הבדל שנבדק לעתים קרובות.

definition: A test done to discover something new or verify a hypothesis.
definitionHe: בדיקה שנעשית כדי לגלות משהו חדש או לאמת השערה.
examples: The experiment produced unexpected results.
Students performed experiments in the chemistry lab.
They designed an experiment to test the theory.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית מדעית אומרים conduct/perform/carry out an experiment, לא make.

tip: In scientific English, use 'conduct/perform/carry out an experiment' (not 'make an experiment').
tipHe: באנגלית מדעית אומרים conduct/perform/carry out an experiment (לא make an experiment).

definition: The smallest unit of a substance that has all the properties of that substance.
definitionHe: היחידה הקטנה ביותר של חומר שיש לה את כל התכונות של אותו חומר.
examples: A water molecule consists of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
Scientists studied the structure of the molecule.
The molecule was too small to see with a regular microscope.

commonMistakes.wrong: The molecules of water is H2O
commonMistakes.explanation: כשמדברים על הרכב כללי, אומרים the water molecule (יחיד) ולא the molecules of water.

tip: Use 'the water molecule' for general description. 'Molecule' comes from Latin 'molecula' (small mass).
tipHe: אומרים the water molecule לתיאור כללי. molecule בא מלטינית molecula (מסה קטנה).

definition: A living thing, such as a plant, animal, or bacterium.
definitionHe: יצור חי, כגון צמח, בעל חיים או חיידק.
examples: The organism adapted to its environment.
Single-celled organisms were the first life on Earth.
They discovered a new organism in the deep sea.

commonMistakes.explanation: organism הוא it/itself (לא he/himself), כי אורגניזמים הם ניטרליים באנגלית.

tip: Organisms use 'it/itself' pronouns in English (not 'he/himself'), unless referring to a specific named animal.
tipHe: אורגניזמים משתמשים בכינויים it/itself באנגלית (לא he/himself), אלא אם מתייחסים לחיה ספציפית בשם.

definition: The gradual development of species over millions of years.
definitionHe: ההתפתחות ההדרגתית של מינים לאורך מיליוני שנים.
examples: Darwin's theory of evolution changed biology.
Evolution occurs through natural selection.
The evolution of technology has been rapid.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית הביטוי הנכון הוא the theory of evolution, לא the evolution theory.

tip: The standard phrase is 'the theory of evolution' (not 'the evolution theory'). Also used metaphorically for gradual change.
tipHe: הביטוי הסטנדרטי הוא the theory of evolution (לא the evolution theory). משמש גם מטאפורית לשינוי הדרגתי.

definition: A fact or event that can be observed, especially one that is remarkable.
definitionHe: עובדה או אירוע שניתן לצפות בהם, במיוחד כזו שהיא יוצאת דופן.
examples: The northern lights are a natural phenomenon.
Scientists studied the phenomenon for years.
Social media has become a global phenomenon.

commonMistakes.explanation: רבים של phenomenon הוא phenomena (מיוונית), לא phenomenons.

tip: Singular: 'phenomenon'. Plural: 'phenomena' (from Greek). Never 'phenomenons'. 'These phenomena are...'
tipHe: יחיד: phenomenon. רבים: phenomena (מיוונית). אף פעם לא phenomenons. אומרים these phenomena are...

definition: The complete set of genetic material in an organism.
definitionHe: המערך המלא של חומר גנטי באורגניזם.
examples: Scientists mapped the human genome in 2003.
The genome contains all the DNA instructions.
Genome editing raises ethical questions.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: genome עם e בסוף.

tip: 'Genome' ends with an 'e'. Related words: genomic (adjective), genomics (field of study).
tipHe: genome מסתיים ב-e. מילים קשורות: genomic (תואר), genomics (תחום מחקר).

definition: A community of living things interacting with their environment.
definitionHe: קהילה של יצורים חיים המתקשרים עם סביבתם.
examples: The rainforest ecosystem is incredibly diverse.
Pollution threatens marine ecosystems.
Each ecosystem has its own food chain.

commonMistakes.explanation: ecosystem נכתבת כמילה אחת, ללא מקף.

tip: 'Ecosystem' is written as one word (no hyphen). It was coined in 1935 by combining 'ecology' and 'system'.
tipHe: ecosystem נכתבת כמילה אחת (ללא מקף). הומצאה ב-1935 משילוב ecology ו-system.

definition: A statement that has been proven true based on previously established facts.
definitionHe: הצהרה שהוכחה כנכונה על בסיס עובדות שנקבעו קודם.
examples: The Pythagorean theorem is taught in every school.
She proved the theorem using a new method.
The theorem applies to all right triangles.

commonMistakes.explanation: הפועל הוא prove-proved-proved/proven, לא proof (שהוא שם עצם).

tip: 'Prove' is the verb (proved/proven). 'Proof' is the noun. Don't use 'proof' as a verb in academic writing.
tipHe: prove הוא הפועל (proved/proven). proof הוא שם עצם. אל תשתמשו ב-proof כפועל בכתיבה אקדמית.

definition: A factor that can change in an experiment or mathematical equation.
definitionHe: גורם שיכול להשתנות בניסוי או במשוואה מתמטית.
examples: The experiment has two independent variables.
Temperature was the controlled variable.
She isolated each variable to test it separately.

commonMistakes.explanation: variables הוא רבים, לכן הפועל צריך להיות were ולא was.

tip: 'Variables' is plural → 'were measured'. Also, 'variable' can be an adjective meaning 'changeable'.
tipHe: variables הוא רבים → were measured. כמו כן, variable יכול להיות תואר שמשמעותו 'משתנה'.

definition: An extremely small piece of matter.
definitionHe: פיסת חומר קטנה ביותר.
examples: Atoms are made up of smaller particles.
The air was full of dust particles.
Scientists discovered a new subatomic particle.

commonMistakes.explanation: particle ביחיד, particles ברבים - יש להתאים את הפועל.

tip: Remember to match singular/plural: 'a particle is' but 'particles are'. In grammar, 'particle' also means a small word like 'up' or 'off'.
tipHe: יש להתאים יחיד/רבים: a particle is אבל particles are. בדקדוק, particle גם אומר מילון קטנה כמו up או off.

definition: A substance that speeds up a chemical reaction; something that causes change.
definitionHe: חומר שמאיץ תגובה כימית; משהו שגורם לשינוי.
examples: The enzyme acts as a catalyst in the reaction.
Her speech was a catalyst for change.
Without a catalyst, the reaction would take years.

commonMistakes.wrong: The catalyst made the reaction more faster
commonMistakes.correct: The catalyst made the reaction faster
commonMistakes.explanation: more faster שגוי - faster כבר בצורת ההשוואה, לא צריך more.

tip: Never use 'more' with '-er' comparatives. It's 'faster' (not 'more faster'), 'bigger' (not 'more bigger').
tipHe: אף פעם לא משתמשים ב-more עם השוואה של er-. אומרים faster (לא more faster), bigger (לא more bigger).

definition: The combination of elements to form a whole; the production of a substance.
definitionHe: שילוב של אלמנטים ליצירת שלם; ייצור של חומר.
examples: The synthesis of the compound took several weeks.
Her essay was a synthesis of different viewpoints.
Chemical synthesis is used to create new drugs.

commonMistakes.wrong: The synthesis of the two ideas were interesting
commonMistakes.correct: The synthesis of the two ideas was interesting
commonMistakes.explanation: synthesis הוא יחיד (הרבים: syntheses), לכן הפועל הוא was.

tip: Singular: 'synthesis'. Plural: 'syntheses'. The verb 'synthesize' means to combine or create.
tipHe: יחיד: synthesis. רבים: syntheses. הפועל synthesize פירושו לשלב או ליצור.

definition: A mutual relationship or connection between two things.
definitionHe: קשר הדדי או חיבור בין שני דברים.
examples: There is a strong correlation between smoking and cancer.
Correlation does not imply causation.
The study found a positive correlation between exercise and mood.

commonMistakes.wrong: There is a correlation with the two factors
commonMistakes.correct: There is a correlation between the two factors
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים correlation between X and Y, לא correlation with.

tip: Use 'correlation between A and B' (not 'with'). Remember: 'correlation does not imply causation' is a key scientific principle.
tipHe: אומרים correlation between A and B (לא with). זכרו: correlation does not imply causation הוא עיקרון מדעי חשוב.

definition: An instrument used to see very small objects that are invisible to the naked eye.
definitionHe: מכשיר המשמש לראות עצמים קטנים מאוד שאינם נראים לעין בלתי מזוינת.
examples: The bacteria were visible only under a microscope.
She examined the sample through a microscope.
Electron microscopes can magnify up to 10 million times.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית מסתכלים through (דרך) מיקרוסקופ, לא in.

tip: Use 'look through a microscope' or 'under a microscope' (not 'look in a microscope').
tipHe: אומרים look through a microscope או under a microscope (לא look in a microscope).

definition: The act of putting money into something to make a profit.
definitionHe: הפעולה של הכנסת כסף למשהו כדי להרוויח.
examples: Real estate is a popular investment.
The investment paid off after five years.
They made a significant investment in technology.

commonMistakes.explanation: invest הוא פועל. שם העצם הוא investment.

tip: 'Invest' is the verb, 'investment' is the noun. Don't use 'invest' as a noun.
tipHe: invest הוא הפועל, investment הוא שם העצם. אל תשתמשו ב-invest כשם עצם.

definition: A general increase in prices and fall in the value of money.
definitionHe: עלייה כללית במחירים וירידה בערך הכסף.
examples: Inflation reached 5% this year.
High inflation reduces purchasing power.
The central bank raised interest rates to combat inflation.

commonMistakes.explanation: כשמדברים על אינפלציה כמושג כלכלי כללי, לא משתמשים ב-the.

tip: When discussing inflation as a general concept, don't use 'the'. Use 'the' only when referring to specific inflation.
tipHe: כשדנים באינפלציה כמושג כללי, לא משתמשים ב-the. משתמשים ב-the רק כשמתייחסים לאינפלציה ספציפית.

definition: The total income generated by a business or government.
definitionHe: ההכנסה הכוללת שנוצרת על ידי עסק או ממשלה.
examples: The company's revenue grew by 20%.
Tax revenue funds public services.
Advertising is their main source of revenue.

commonMistakes.wrong: The revenues of the company has grown
commonMistakes.explanation: revenue יכול להיות ביחיד או רבים, אבל הפועל צריך להתאים. גם עדיף company's revenue.

tip: 'Revenue' can be singular or plural. Use possessive: 'the company's revenue' rather than 'the revenue of the company'.
tipHe: revenue יכול להיות יחיד או רבים. משתמשים בשייכות: the company's revenue ולא the revenue of the company.

definition: A loan used to buy property, with the property as security.
definitionHe: הלוואה לרכישת נכס, כאשר הנכס משמש כבטוחה.
examples: They took out a mortgage to buy the house.
The mortgage rate has increased recently.
She pays her mortgage every month.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים take out a mortgage (לא רק take a mortgage).

tip: The 't' in 'mortgage' is silent. Use 'take out a mortgage' (not just 'take'). From French: 'mort' (death) + 'gage' (pledge).
tipHe: ה-t ב-mortgage שקטה. אומרים take out a mortgage (לא רק take). מצרפתית: mort (מוות) + gage (ערבות).

definition: A payment made by a company to its shareholders from its profits.
definitionHe: תשלום שנעשה על ידי חברה לבעלי המניות שלה מהרווחים.
examples: The company declared a dividend of $2 per share.
Investors look for stocks that pay regular dividends.
The dividend was paid quarterly.

commonMistakes.explanation: pay הוא פועל לא רגיל: pay-paid-paid (לא payed).

tip: 'Pay' is irregular: pay-paid-paid (not 'payed'). 'Dividend' comes from Latin 'dividendum' (thing to be divided).
tipHe: pay הוא פועל לא רגיל: pay-paid-paid (לא payed). dividend בא מלטינית dividendum (דבר שיש לחלק).

definition: The state of being unable to pay debts; legal declaration of inability to pay.
definitionHe: מצב של חוסר יכולת לשלם חובות; הכרזה משפטית על חדלות פירעון.
examples: The company filed for bankruptcy last month.
Bankruptcy can have lasting effects on credit scores.
Several banks faced bankruptcy during the crisis.

commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים go bankrupt (ללא to). או: file for bankruptcy.

tip: 'Go bankrupt' (not 'go to bankruptcy'). Alternative: 'file for bankruptcy' or 'declare bankruptcy'.
tipHe: אומרים go bankrupt (לא go to bankruptcy). חלופות: file for bankruptcy או declare bankruptcy.

definition: A collection of investments owned by a person or organization.
definitionHe: אוסף השקעות שבבעלות אדם או ארגון.
examples: She manages a diverse investment portfolio.
His portfolio includes stocks and bonds.
You should diversify your portfolio to reduce risk.

commonMistakes.wrong: He has a portfolio of invest
commonMistakes.explanation: invest הוא פועל - שם העצם הוא investment. אומרים investment portfolio.

tip: 'Portfolio' can also mean a collection of work samples (design portfolio, art portfolio), not just investments.
tipHe: portfolio יכול גם לאמר אוסף של דוגמאות עבודה (תיק עיצוב, תיק אמנות), לא רק השקעות.

definition: A raw material or basic product that can be bought and sold.
definitionHe: חומר גלם או מוצר בסיסי שניתן לקנות ולמכור.
examples: Oil is the world's most traded commodity.
Commodity prices fluctuated throughout the year.
Gold is considered a safe-haven commodity.

commonMistakes.explanation: raise הוא פועל יוצא (צריך מושא). rise הוא פועל עומד. מחירים rise (עולים מעצמם).

tip: 'Rise' (intransitive) = go up by itself. 'Raise' (transitive) = make something go up. Prices rise (not raise).
tipHe: rise (עומד) = עולה מעצמו. raise (יוצא) = מעלה משהו. מחירים rise (לא raise).

definition: A financial debt or obligation; legal responsibility.
definitionHe: חוב כספי או התחייבות; אחריות משפטית.
examples: The company's liabilities exceeded its assets.
He became a liability to the team.
They denied liability for the accident.

commonMistakes.explanation: liability ספירה - ברבים: liabilities.

tip: 'Liability' is countable - plural: 'liabilities'. It also informally means 'a burden': 'He's a liability' (he causes problems).
tipHe: liability ספירה - רבים: liabilities. גם אומרים בלתי רשמי he's a liability (הוא נטל).

definition: The value of an asset minus any money owed on it.
definitionHe: ערך הנכס פחות כסף שחייבים עליו.
examples: They have 30% equity in their home.
The startup raised capital by offering equity.
Equity investors share in the company's profits.

commonMistakes.explanation: equity לא צריך תמיד a/an לפניו. אומרים have equity או hold equity.

tip: 'Equity' also means fairness/justice in non-financial contexts: 'equity in education'. Same word, different meaning.
tipHe: equity גם אומר הוגנות/צדק בהקשרים לא-פיננסיים: equity in education. אותה מילה, משמעות שונה.

definition: A decrease in the value of an asset over time.
definitionHe: ירידה בערך של נכס לאורך זמן.
examples: The car's depreciation was significant in the first year.
Depreciation is an important accounting concept.
They calculated the annual depreciation of equipment.

commonMistakes.wrong: The depreciation of the car is high very
commonMistakes.correct: The depreciation of the car is very high
commonMistakes.explanation: very בא לפני high, לא אחרי: very high.

tip: Word order matters: 'very high' (not 'high very'). The verb form is 'depreciate'. Opposite: 'appreciation'.
tipHe: סדר המילים חשוב: very high (לא high very). צורת הפועל: depreciate. הפוך: appreciation.

definition: An instance of buying or selling; a business deal.
definitionHe: מקרה של קנייה או מכירה; עסקה מסחרית.
examples: The transaction was completed online.
Each transaction is recorded in the system.
They processed thousands of transactions daily.

commonMistakes.explanation: בהקשר רשמי, אומרים complete/process a transaction ולא do.

tip: In formal/business English, use 'complete/process/conduct a transaction' rather than 'do'.
tipHe: באנגלית עסקית/רשמית, אומרים complete/process/conduct a transaction ולא do.

definition: The percentage charged for borrowing money or earned on savings.
definitionHe: האחוז שנגבה על הלוואת כסף או שנצבר על חיסכון.
examples: The bank raised its interest rate to 4%.
Low interest rates encourage borrowing.
She compared interest rates before choosing a loan.

commonMistakes.explanation: interest לבד פירושו עניין. interest rate פירושו ריבית. צריך rate.

tip: 'Interest' alone can mean curiosity/concern. 'Interest rate' specifically means the financial percentage.
tipHe: interest לבד יכול לאמר סקרנות/עניין. interest rate במיוחד אומר אחוז פיננסי.

definition: A place where shares of companies are bought and sold.
definitionHe: מקום שבו קונים ומוכרים מניות של חברות.
examples: The stock market crashed in 2008.
She invests heavily in the stock market.
Stock market prices fluctuate daily.

commonMistakes.wrong: He plays in the stock market
commonMistakes.correct: He invests in the stock market
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים invest in the stock market. play לא מתאים להקשר רציני.

tip: Use 'invest in' the stock market (not 'play'). 'Play the stock market' exists but implies gambling/risk.
tipHe: אומרים invest in the stock market (לא play). play the stock market קיים אבל מרמז על הימורים/סיכון.

definition: When a government spends more money than it receives.
definitionHe: כאשר ממשלה מוציאה יותר כסף ממה שהיא מקבלת.
examples: The country's budget deficit has been growing.
They need to reduce the budget deficit.
A large budget deficit can lead to economic problems.

commonMistakes.wrong: The deficit of the budget increased
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים budget deficit כביטוי אחד, לא deficit of the budget.

tip: 'Budget deficit' is a compound noun - keep the words together. Opposite: 'budget surplus'.
tipHe: budget deficit הוא שם עצם מורכב - שומרים את המילים ביחד. הפוך: budget surplus.

definition: A feeling of worry, nervousness, or unease about something uncertain.
definitionHe: תחושת דאגה, עצבנות או אי שקט לגבי משהו לא ודאי.
examples: She suffers from anxiety before exams.
Anxiety disorders are very common.
The uncertainty caused him great anxiety.

commonMistakes.wrong: I have anxiety from the test
commonMistakes.correct: I have anxiety about the test
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים anxiety about (לא from).

tip: Use 'anxiety about' (not 'anxiety from'). The adjective form is 'anxious': 'I'm anxious about the test'.
tipHe: אומרים anxiety about (לא anxiety from). צורת התואר: anxious: I'm anxious about the test.

definition: Relating to mental processes of perception, memory, and reasoning.
definitionHe: הקשור לתהליכים מנטליים של תפיסה, זיכרון וחשיבה.
examples: Cognitive abilities decline with age.
She studies cognitive psychology.
The test measures cognitive development in children.

commonMistakes.explanation: cognitive הוא תואר, לא שם עצם. צריך שם עצם אחריו: cognitive abilities.

tip: 'Cognitive' is only an adjective - it needs a noun after it. Say 'cognitive skills/abilities' (not 'cognitives').
tipHe: cognitive הוא רק תואר - צריך שם עצם אחריו. אומרים cognitive skills/abilities (לא cognitives).

definition: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another person.
definitionHe: היכולת להבין ולחלוק את הרגשות של אדם אחר.
examples: She showed great empathy toward the victims.
Empathy is different from sympathy.
Teaching empathy to children is important.

commonMistakes.wrong: She has empathy with the poor
commonMistakes.correct: She has empathy for the poor
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים empathy for/toward (לא empathy with).

tip: 'Empathy for/toward' someone. 'Empathy' = feeling their feelings. 'Sympathy' = feeling sorry for them. Important distinction!
tipHe: empathy for/toward מישהו. empathy = להרגיש את הרגשות שלהם. sympathy = לרחם עליהם. הבדל חשוב!

definition: The way you understand or interpret something; awareness through the senses.
definitionHe: הדרך שבה אתה מבין או מפרש משהו; מודעות דרך החושים.
examples: Public perception of the company changed after the scandal.
Perception of color varies between individuals.
His perception of the situation was different from mine.

commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים perception of (לא about).

tip: Use 'perception of' (not 'perception about'). The adjective is 'perceptive' (= observant and insightful).
tipHe: אומרים perception of (לא perception about). התואר הוא perceptive (= תצפיתני ובעל תובנות).

definition: Existing in the mind but not immediately available to consciousness.
definitionHe: קיים בתודעה אבל לא זמין באופן מיידי למודעות.
examples: Subconscious fears can affect behavior.
The decision was made on a subconscious level.
Music can influence the subconscious mind.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: subconscious (עם ci).

tip: 'Subconscious' vs 'unconscious': subconscious = below awareness but accessible. Unconscious = completely unaware or knocked out.
tipHe: subconscious מול unconscious: subconscious = מתחת למודעות אבל נגיש. unconscious = לגמרי לא מודע.

definition: A deeply distressing or disturbing experience; emotional shock.
definitionHe: חוויה מצערת או מטרידה עמוקות; הלם רגשי.
examples: She experienced trauma during childhood.
The accident left lasting psychological trauma.
They provide therapy for trauma survivors.

commonMistakes.explanation: עם trauma אומרים severe/deep (לא big). trauma היא גם לא-ספירה בהקשר פסיכולוגי.

tip: Use 'severe/deep/significant trauma' (not 'big'). In medical contexts, trauma also means physical injury.
tipHe: אומרים severe/deep/significant trauma (לא big). בהקשרים רפואיים, trauma גם אומר פציעה פיזית.

definition: The ability to recover quickly from difficulties.
definitionHe: היכולת להתאושש מהר מקשיים.
examples: Her resilience helped her overcome the challenges.
Children can show remarkable resilience.
Building emotional resilience is important for mental health.

commonMistakes.wrong: He has a lot of resiliance
commonMistakes.correct: He has a lot of resilience
commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: resilience עם ence ולא ance.

tip: Spelling: 'resilience' (not 'resiliance'). The adjective is 'resilient'. It's uncountable.
tipHe: איות: resilience (לא resiliance). התואר: resilient. זו מילה לא-ספירה.

definition: A medical condition that disrupts normal functioning.
definitionHe: מצב רפואי שמשבש תפקוד תקין.
examples: She was diagnosed with an anxiety disorder.
Eating disorders affect millions of people.
The disorder can be managed with medication.

commonMistakes.wrong: He has a disorder of anxiety
commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית שם התואר בא לפני: anxiety disorder (לא disorder of anxiety).

tip: In English, the modifier comes first: 'anxiety disorder' (not 'disorder of anxiety'). This is compound noun formation.
tipHe: באנגלית, המגדיר בא ראשון: anxiety disorder (לא disorder of anxiety). זוהי יצירת שם עצם מורכב.

definition: Something that causes a reaction or response.
definitionHe: משהו שגורם לתגובה.
examples: The loud noise was a stimulus that triggered fear.
The brain responds to various stimuli.
Financial stimulus packages boosted the economy.

commonMistakes.explanation: הרבים של stimulus הוא stimuli (מלטינית), לא stimuluses.

tip: Singular: 'stimulus'. Plural: 'stimuli' (Latin). Like 'focus/foci', 'fungus/fungi'.
tipHe: יחיד: stimulus. רבים: stimuli (לטינית). כמו focus/foci, fungus/fungi.

definition: An innate pattern of behavior; a natural tendency.
definitionHe: דפוס התנהגות מולד; נטייה טבעית.
examples: Animals rely on instinct to survive.
Her first instinct was to run.
Maternal instinct is powerful in many species.

commonMistakes.wrong: She had an instinct that something is wrong
commonMistakes.correct: She had an instinct that something was wrong
commonMistakes.explanation: אחרי had (עבר) צריך was (עבר) ולא is (הווה) - התאמת זמנים.

tip: Sequence of tenses: 'She had an instinct that something was wrong' (not 'is'). Past → past.
tipHe: רצף זמנים: She had an instinct that something was wrong (לא is). עבר → עבר.

definition: Relating to the way a person or animal acts.
definitionHe: הקשור לדרך שבה אדם או בעל חיים פועלים.
examples: Behavioral therapy can help with anxiety.
The study focused on behavioral patterns.
Behavioral changes may indicate a problem.

commonMistakes.wrong: The behaviorial problems of the child
commonMistakes.correct: The behavioral problems of the child
commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: behavioral (אמריקאית) או behavioural (בריטית), לא behaviorial.

tip: American: 'behavioral'. British: 'behavioural'. Never 'behaviorial'. From 'behavior/behaviour' + '-al'.
tipHe: אמריקאית: behavioral. בריטית: behavioural. אף פעם לא behaviorial. מ-behavior/behaviour + al.

definition: An extreme or irrational fear of something.
definitionHe: פחד קיצוני או לא רציונלי ממשהו.
examples: She has a phobia of spiders.
Social phobia prevents him from attending parties.
Many phobias can be treated with therapy.

commonMistakes.wrong: She has a phobia from heights
commonMistakes.correct: She has a phobia of heights
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים phobia of (לא phobia from). בעברית אומרים פוביה מ-, אבל באנגלית of.

tip: Use 'phobia of' (not 'from'). Common phobias: claustrophobia (enclosed spaces), arachnophobia (spiders), acrophobia (heights).
tipHe: אומרים phobia of (לא from). פוביות נפוצות: claustrophobia (מקומות סגורים), arachnophobia (עכבישים), acrophobia (גבהים).

definition: A mild mental disorder involving anxiety, depression, or obsessive behavior.
definitionHe: הפרעה נפשית קלה הכוללת חרדה, דיכאון או התנהגות אובססיבית.
examples: His neurosis about cleanliness dominated his life.
Neurosis is less severe than psychosis.
Many people experience some form of neurosis.

commonMistakes.wrong: She suffers from neurosis since childhood
commonMistakes.correct: She has suffered from neurosis since childhood
commonMistakes.explanation: עם since צריך present perfect (has suffered), לא present simple.

tip: With 'since', use present perfect: 'has suffered since' (not 'suffers since'). Plural: 'neuroses'.
tipHe: עם since, משתמשים ב-present perfect: has suffered since (לא suffers since). רבים: neuroses.

definition: Confidence in one's own worth or abilities.
definitionHe: ביטחון בערך העצמי או ביכולות של עצמך.
examples: Low self-esteem can lead to depression.
The program aims to boost children's self-esteem.
She has high self-esteem and believes in herself.

commonMistakes.wrong: He needs to raise his self esteem
commonMistakes.correct: He needs to raise his self-esteem
commonMistakes.explanation: self-esteem נכתב עם מקף. גם אפשר boost/build self-esteem.

tip: 'Self-esteem' is hyphenated. Use 'boost/build/raise self-esteem'. 'Self-esteem' vs 'self-confidence' are slightly different.
tipHe: self-esteem נכתב עם מקף. אומרים boost/build/raise self-esteem.

definition: A person who is more focused on internal thoughts and feelings.
definitionHe: אדם שמתמקד יותר במחשבות ורגשות פנימיים.
examples: As an introvert, she prefers small gatherings.
Introverts recharge by spending time alone.
The world often favors extroverts over introverts.

commonMistakes.explanation: כתואר, צריך introverted (לא introvert). introvert הוא שם עצם.

tip: As an adjective, use 'introverted' (not 'introvert'). 'Introvert' is a noun: 'She is an introvert' or 'She is introverted'.
tipHe: כתואר, אומרים introverted (לא introvert). introvert הוא שם עצם: She is an introvert או She is introverted.

definition: The decision of a jury or judge in a legal case.
definitionHe: ההחלטה של חבר מושבעים או שופט בתיק משפטי.
examples: The jury reached a verdict of not guilty.
The verdict was announced after three days.
They appealed the verdict to a higher court.

commonMistakes.wrong: The judge gave a guilty verdict
commonMistakes.correct: The jury delivered a guilty verdict
commonMistakes.explanation: בדרך כלל חבר המושבעים (jury) נותן את הverdikt, השופט (judge) נותן את הsentence.

tip: Typically, the jury gives the 'verdict' (guilty/not guilty), while the judge gives the 'sentence' (punishment).
tipHe: בדרך כלל, חבר המושבעים נותן את הverdict (אשם/לא אשם), ואילו השופט נותן את הsentence (עונש).

definition: The side in a legal case that accuses someone of a crime.
definitionHe: הצד בתיק משפטי שמאשים מישהו בפשע.
examples: The prosecution presented strong evidence.
She works for the prosecution.
The prosecution called three witnesses.

commonMistakes.explanation: prosecution (כקבוצה) בדרך כלל לוקח פועל ביחיד באנגלית אמריקאית.

tip: In American English, 'the prosecution' usually takes a singular verb. The verb form is 'prosecute'.
tipHe: באנגלית אמריקאית, the prosecution בדרך כלל לוקח פועל יחיד. צורת הפועל: prosecute.

definition: A person accused of a crime in a court of law.
definitionHe: אדם שמואשם בפשע בבית משפט.
examples: The defendant pleaded not guilty.
The defendant was released on bail.
The defendant's lawyer argued for dismissal.

commonMistakes.wrong: The defendant claimed that he is innocent
commonMistakes.correct: The defendant claimed that he was innocent
commonMistakes.explanation: אחרי claimed (עבר) צריך was (עבר) - התאמת זמנים.

tip: Sequence of tenses: 'claimed that he was' (not 'is'). The opposite is 'plaintiff' (the one who sues).
tipHe: רצף זמנים: claimed that he was (לא is). ההפך: plaintiff (התובע).

definition: A formal statement made under oath in a court of law.
definitionHe: הצהרה רשמית שניתנת תחת שבועה בבית משפט.
examples: Her testimony was crucial to the case.
He gave testimony before the committee.
The witness changed his testimony during the trial.

commonMistakes.wrong: She gave a testimony in the court
commonMistakes.explanation: testimony לא צריך a לפניו ו-court לא צריך the כשמדברים על in court.

tip: 'Give testimony' (no 'a') and 'in court' (no 'the') are standard legal phrases.
tipHe: give testimony (ללא a) ו-in court (ללא the) הם ביטויים משפטיים סטנדרטיים.

definition: The official power to make legal decisions in a particular area.
definitionHe: הסמכות הרשמית לקבל החלטות משפטיות באזור מסוים.
examples: This crime falls under federal jurisdiction.
The court has no jurisdiction over international disputes.
The case was transferred to another jurisdiction.

commonMistakes.wrong: This is not in our jurisdiction area
commonMistakes.correct: This is not within our jurisdiction
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים within our jurisdiction (לא in our jurisdiction area).

tip: Use 'within our jurisdiction' or 'under our jurisdiction' (not 'in our jurisdiction area').
tipHe: אומרים within our jurisdiction או under our jurisdiction (לא in our jurisdiction area).

definition: A written law passed by a legislative body.
definitionHe: חוק כתוב שנחקק על ידי גוף מחוקק.
examples: The statute was enacted in 2015.
According to the statute, the penalty is a fine.
The statute of limitations expired last year.

commonMistakes.explanation: statue (פסל) ו-statute (חוק) הן מילים שונות! שימו לב להבדל באיות ובהגייה.

tip: Don't confuse 'statute' (law, STAT-yoot) with 'statue' (sculpture, STAT-yoo). Different words!
tipHe: אל תבלבלו בין statute (חוק, STAT-yoot) לבין statue (פסל, STAT-yoo). מילים שונות!

definition: A lawyer, especially one qualified to represent clients in court.
definitionHe: עורך דין, במיוחד כזה שמוסמך לייצג לקוחות בבית משפט.
examples: She hired an attorney to handle the case.
The attorney general is the chief legal officer.
His attorney advised him not to speak.

commonMistakes.wrong: She went to an attorney's office
commonMistakes.correct: She went to her attorney's office
commonMistakes.explanation: attorney הוא ספציפי - בדרך כלל צריך לציין של מי: my/her/the attorney.

tip: 'Attorney' = formal American English for lawyer. In UK, they say 'solicitor' or 'barrister'. 'Attorney at law' is the full title.
tipHe: attorney = אנגלית אמריקאית רשמית לעורך דין. בבריטניה אומרים solicitor או barrister.

definition: A person who brings a legal action against someone in court.
definitionHe: אדם שמגיש תביעה משפטית נגד מישהו בבית משפט.
examples: The plaintiff filed a lawsuit for damages.
The plaintiff's lawyer presented the case.
The plaintiff was awarded compensation.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: plaintiff עם ff בסוף.

tip: Spelling: 'plaintiff' ends in '-iff'. The plaintiff sues, the defendant is sued. Remember the pair!
tipHe: איות: plaintiff מסתיים ב-iff. התובע (plaintiff) תובע, הנתבע (defendant) נתבע. זכרו את הזוג!

definition: The process of taking a dispute to court.
definitionHe: התהליך של הבאת סכסוך לבית משפט.
examples: The litigation lasted for three years.
They want to avoid costly litigation.
The company faces litigation from former employees.

commonMistakes.wrong: They started a litigation against the company
commonMistakes.correct: They started litigation against the company
commonMistakes.explanation: litigation היא לא-ספירה, לא אומרים a litigation.

tip: 'Litigation' is uncountable - no 'a'. Use 'start/begin litigation' or 'a piece of litigation'.
tipHe: litigation היא לא-ספירה - ללא a. אומרים start/begin litigation או a piece of litigation.

definition: A specific provision or condition in a legal document.
definitionHe: הוראה או תנאי ספציפיים במסמך משפטי.
examples: The contract contains a confidentiality clause.
They added a new clause to the agreement.
The escape clause allows termination.

commonMistakes.wrong: There is a clouse in the contract
commonMistakes.correct: There is a clause in the contract
commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: clause (לא clouse). ההגייה: klawz.

tip: 'Clause' in grammar = a group of words with subject and verb. In law = a section of a document. Same word!
tipHe: clause בדקדוק = קבוצת מילים עם נושא ופועל. במשפט = סעיף במסמך. אותה מילה!

definition: A document issued by a judge authorizing an action, such as an arrest or search.
definitionHe: מסמך שהוצא על ידי שופט המאשר פעולה, כגון מעצר או חיפוש.
examples: The police obtained a search warrant.
An arrest warrant was issued for the suspect.
They executed the warrant at dawn.

commonMistakes.explanation: police הוא תמיד רבים באנגלית, לכן have ולא has.

tip: 'Police' is always plural in English: 'the police have' (not 'has'). This is a key grammar point.
tipHe: police הוא תמיד רבים באנגלית: the police have (לא has). זו נקודת דקדוק חשובה.

definition: A judgment that a person is not guilty of a crime.
definitionHe: פסיקה שאדם אינו אשם בפשע.
examples: The acquittal surprised many people.
After the acquittal, he was set free.
The lawyer fought for his client's acquittal.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: acquittal עם tt כפולה.

tip: Spelling: 'acquittal' has double 't'. The verb is 'acquit' (acquitted, acquitting - also double 't').
tipHe: איות: acquittal עם tt כפולה. הפועל הוא acquit (acquitted, acquitting - גם tt כפולה).

definition: A serious crime such as murder or robbery.
definitionHe: פשע חמור כגון רצח או שוד.
examples: He was charged with a felony.
Felony convictions carry long prison sentences.
Armed robbery is classified as a felony.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים commit a crime/felony, לא make.

tip: Use 'commit a felony' (not 'make' or 'do'). A 'felony' is more serious than a 'misdemeanor'.
tipHe: אומרים commit a felony (לא make או do). felony חמור יותר מ-misdemeanor (עבירה קלה).

definition: Money paid to a court to allow a prisoner to be released before trial.
definitionHe: כסף ששולם לבית המשפט כדי לאפשר שחרור אסיר לפני המשפט.
examples: He was released on bail of $50,000.
The judge set bail at one million dollars.
She posted bail for her son.

commonMistakes.wrong: He paid the bail and leaved
commonMistakes.correct: He paid the bail and left
commonMistakes.explanation: leave הוא פועל לא רגיל: leave-left-left (לא leaved).

tip: 'Leave' is irregular: leave-left-left (never 'leaved'). 'Post bail' and 'make bail' both mean to pay it.
tipHe: leave הוא פועל לא רגיל: leave-left-left (אף פעם לא leaved). post bail ו-make bail שניהם אומרים לשלם.

definition: A request to a higher court to change a lower court's decision.
definitionHe: בקשה לבית משפט גבוה יותר לשנות החלטה של בית משפט נמוך.
examples: They filed an appeal against the verdict.
The appeal was rejected by the Supreme Court.
She has the right to appeal the decision.

commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים appeal against a decision (לא appeal on).

tip: Use 'appeal against' (British) or 'appeal' directly (American): 'appeal the decision'. Both are correct.
tipHe: אומרים appeal against (בריטית) או appeal ישירות (אמריקאית): appeal the decision. שניהם נכונים.

definition: The quality of being honest and having strong moral principles.
definitionHe: התכונה של להיות ישר ובעל עקרונות מוסריים חזקים.
examples: She is known for her integrity.
The integrity of the data must be maintained.
He acted with integrity throughout his career.

commonMistakes.wrong: He has a lot of integrity
commonMistakes.explanation: integrity היא לא-ספירה - עדיף great/strong integrity ולא a lot of.

tip: 'Integrity' is uncountable. Use 'great integrity' or 'strong integrity'. It also means 'wholeness' (data integrity).
tipHe: integrity היא לא-ספירה. אומרים great integrity או strong integrity. גם אומר שלמות (data integrity).

definition: The quality of being open to more than one interpretation.
definitionHe: התכונה של להיות פתוח ליותר מפירוש אחד.
examples: The ambiguity of the law led to confusion.
She dislikes ambiguity in instructions.
There is some ambiguity in his statement.

commonMistakes.explanation: ambiguity הוא שם עצם, ambiguous הוא תואר. צריך תואר לפני meanings.

tip: 'Ambiguity' is the noun, 'ambiguous' is the adjective. Use 'ambiguous meanings' (not 'ambiguity meanings').
tipHe: ambiguity הוא שם עצם, ambiguous הוא תואר. אומרים ambiguous meanings (לא ambiguity meanings).

definition: A statement that seems contradictory but may be true.
definitionHe: הצהרה שנראית סותרת אבל עשויה להיות נכונה.
examples: It's a paradox that the more you learn, the less you know.
The situation presents an interesting paradox.
The paradox of choice suggests too many options cause anxiety.

commonMistakes.explanation: paradox הוא שם עצם. כתואר צריך paradoxical.

tip: 'Paradox' is a noun, 'paradoxical' is the adjective. Say 'a paradoxical situation' (not 'a paradox situation').
tipHe: paradox הוא שם עצם, paradoxical הוא תואר. אומרים a paradoxical situation (לא a paradox situation).

definition: A particular way of considering something; a point of view.
definitionHe: דרך מסוימת לשקול משהו; נקודת מבט.
examples: Try to see things from a different perspective.
Her perspective on the issue was refreshing.
Traveling broadens your perspective.

commonMistakes.explanation: perspective כבר כוללת את המשמעות של view, לא צריך שניהם.

tip: 'Perspective' already means 'view/outlook'. Don't say 'perspective view'. Just 'from my perspective' or 'my point of view'.
tipHe: perspective כבר אומר מבט/השקפה. אל תאמרו perspective view. רק from my perspective או my point of view.

definition: The state of being aware of one's surroundings, thoughts, and feelings.
definitionHe: המצב של להיות מודע לסביבה, למחשבות ולרגשות.
examples: He lost consciousness after the accident.
Environmental consciousness is growing worldwide.
The nature of consciousness remains a mystery.

commonMistakes.explanation: conscious הוא תואר (מודע). consciousness הוא שם עצם (תודעה). צריך שם עצם אחרי lost.

tip: 'Conscious' = adjective (aware). 'Consciousness' = noun (awareness). 'Conscience' = moral sense. Three different words!
tipHe: conscious = תואר (מודע). consciousness = שם עצם (תודעה). conscience = מצפון. שלוש מילים שונות!

definition: The quality of being genuine, real, or true.
definitionHe: התכונה של להיות אמיתי, מקורי או נכון.
examples: The authenticity of the painting was questioned.
She values authenticity in relationships.
Social media often lacks authenticity.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: authenticity (לא authentity).

tip: Spelling: 'authenticity' (not 'authentity'). The adjective is 'authentic'. Root: Greek 'authentikos' (genuine).
tipHe: איות: authenticity (לא authentity). התואר: authentic. שורש: יוונית authentikos (אמיתי).

definition: Principles concerning right and wrong behavior.
definitionHe: עקרונות הנוגעים להתנהגות נכונה ולא נכונה.
examples: The morality of the decision was debated.
Personal morality varies across cultures.
The story raises questions about morality.

commonMistakes.explanation: people כבר רבים (אנשים), לא צריך s נוסף.

tip: 'People' is already plural (no 's'). 'Peoples' means different ethnic groups/nations. Key difference!
tipHe: people כבר רבים (ללא s). peoples אומר עמים/קבוצות אתניות שונות. הבדל חשוב!

definition: Behavior that matches what is expected or accepted by a group.
definitionHe: התנהגות שתואמת למה שצפוי או מקובל על ידי קבוצה.
examples: Social conformity can suppress individuality.
The experiment tested the limits of conformity.
In conformity with regulations, they changed the policy.

commonMistakes.wrong: He acts in conform with the rules
commonMistakes.correct: He acts in conformity with the rules
commonMistakes.explanation: conform הוא פועל. שם העצם הוא conformity. אומרים in conformity with.

tip: 'Conform' = verb. 'Conformity' = noun. Use 'in conformity with' or 'conform to/with' (verb).
tipHe: conform = פועל. conformity = שם עצם. אומרים in conformity with או conform to/with (פועל).

definition: A system in which people or things are ranked according to status or authority.
definitionHe: מערכת שבה אנשים או דברים מדורגים לפי מעמד או סמכות.
examples: The company has a strict hierarchy.
In the hierarchy of needs, food comes first.
She challenged the existing hierarchy.

commonMistakes.wrong: The hierarcy in the company is strict
commonMistakes.correct: The hierarchy in the company is strict
commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: hierarchy (עם ch ו-y).

tip: Tricky spelling: 'hierarchy' (not 'hierarcy'). Silent 'h' in the middle. From Greek: 'hieros' (sacred) + 'archein' (to rule).
tipHe: איות מורכב: hierarchy (לא hierarcy). h שקטה באמצע. מיוונית: hieros (קדוש) + archein (לשלוט).

definition: The state of having many different types of people or things.
definitionHe: המצב של קיום סוגים רבים ושונים של אנשים או דברים.
examples: The company promotes diversity in the workplace.
Biodiversity is essential for healthy ecosystems.
Cultural diversity enriches society.

commonMistakes.explanation: עם diversity אומרים great/rich (לא big).

tip: Use 'great/rich diversity' (not 'big diversity'). 'Diverse' is the adjective: 'a diverse group'.
tipHe: אומרים great/rich diversity (לא big diversity). diverse הוא התואר: a diverse group.

definition: A special right or advantage available only to certain people.
definitionHe: זכות או יתרון מיוחדים שזמינים רק לאנשים מסוימים.
examples: Education is a privilege, not a right.
He grew up with privilege.
It was a privilege to meet the president.

commonMistakes.wrong: I have the privilege to speak
commonMistakes.correct: I have the privilege of speaking
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים privilege of + gerund (verb-ing), לא privilege to + infinitive.

tip: Use 'privilege of doing' (not 'to do') when expressing honor. But 'privileged to do' (adjective) is correct.
tipHe: אומרים privilege of doing (לא to do) כשמביעים כבוד. אבל privileged to do (תואר) נכון.

definition: A widely held but oversimplified idea about a type of person or thing.
definitionHe: רעיון רווח אך פשטני מדי על סוג של אדם או דבר.
examples: We should challenge harmful stereotypes.
Gender stereotypes limit opportunities.
The movie reinforces cultural stereotypes.

commonMistakes.wrong: He has a stereotype about women
commonMistakes.explanation: כשמדברים על כמה סטריאוטיפים, צריך רבים: stereotypes.

tip: 'Stereotype' is countable. Use 'stereotypical' as the adjective: 'a stereotypical portrayal'. Verb: 'to stereotype'.
tipHe: stereotype ספירה. משתמשים ב-stereotypical כתואר: a stereotypical portrayal. פועל: to stereotype.

definition: The state of being certain to happen; unavoidability.
definitionHe: המצב של להיות ודאי שיקרה; בלתי נמנע.
examples: They accepted the inevitability of change.
There is an inevitability about aging.
The inevitability of the outcome was clear.

commonMistakes.wrong: The inevitability of the result was clear since long time
commonMistakes.correct: The inevitability of the result has been clear for a long time
commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים for a long time (לא since long time). since דורש נקודת זמן ספציפית.

tip: Use 'for a long time' (duration) not 'since long time'. 'Since' needs a specific point: 'since 2020'.
tipHe: אומרים for a long time (משך) ולא since long time. since דורש נקודה ספציפית: since 2020.

definition: The quality of being exposed to the possibility of harm.
definitionHe: התכונה של להיות חשוף לאפשרות של פגיעה.
examples: Showing vulnerability requires courage.
The vulnerability of the system was exposed.
Children's vulnerability makes protection essential.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: vulnerability (לא vulnerablity).

tip: Spelling: 'vulnerability' (from 'vulnerable'). In tech, it specifically means a security weakness.
tipHe: איות: vulnerability (מ-vulnerable). בטכנולוגיה, זה אומר ספציפית חולשת אבטחה.

definition: An unfair inclination for or against a person, group, or thing.
definitionHe: נטייה לא הוגנת בעד או נגד אדם, קבוצה או דבר.
examples: The study found evidence of bias in hiring.
Confirmation bias affects how we interpret information.
She tried to report the story without bias.

commonMistakes.explanation: bias הוא שם עצם. כתואר צריך biased.

tip: 'Bias' = noun. 'Biased' = adjective. Say 'He is biased' (not 'He is bias'). Very common error!
tipHe: bias = שם עצם. biased = תואר. אומרים He is biased (לא He is bias). טעות נפוצה מאוד!

definition: Advancement to a higher position or rank at work.
definitionHe: התקדמות לתפקיד או דרגה גבוהים יותר בעבודה.
examples: She received a promotion to senior manager.
He's hoping for a promotion this year.
The promotion came with a salary increase.

commonMistakes.explanation: promote הוא פועל. שם העצם הוא promotion.

tip: 'Promote' = verb. 'Promotion' = noun. 'He was promoted' (passive) or 'He got a promotion'.
tipHe: promote = פועל. promotion = שם עצם. He was promoted (סביל) או He got a promotion.

definition: The act of voluntarily leaving a job or position.
definitionHe: הפעולה של עזיבה מרצון של עבודה או תפקיד.
examples: She handed in her resignation last week.
His sudden resignation surprised everyone.
The resignation takes effect next month.

commonMistakes.explanation: resign הוא פועל. שם העצם הוא resignation.

tip: 'Resign' = verb. 'Resignation' = noun. Use 'hand in/submit/tender your resignation'.
tipHe: resign = פועל. resignation = שם עצם. אומרים hand in/submit/tender your resignation.

definition: The process of finding and hiring new employees.
definitionHe: התהליך של מציאה והעסקה של עובדים חדשים.
examples: The company's recruitment process takes three weeks.
Online recruitment has become very popular.
They hired a recruitment agency to find candidates.

commonMistakes.wrong: The recruitment of new workers are important
commonMistakes.correct: The recruitment of new workers is important
commonMistakes.explanation: recruitment הוא יחיד, לכן הפועל is ולא are.

tip: 'Recruitment' (the process) is singular → 'is'. The verb is 'recruit': 'We're recruiting new staff'.
tipHe: recruitment (התהליך) הוא יחיד → is. הפועל: recruit: We're recruiting new staff.

definition: The skills, knowledge, or experience needed for a job.
definitionHe: הכישורים, הידע או הניסיון הדרושים לעבודה.
examples: She has the right qualifications for the job.
Academic qualifications are important in this field.
He gained new qualifications through training.

commonMistakes.explanation: qualification ספירה - עם many צריך רבים: qualifications.

tip: 'Qualifications' is usually plural when referring to skills/credentials. 'Qualify' is the verb, 'qualified' the adjective.
tipHe: qualifications בדרך כלל ברבים כשמתייחסים לכישורים. qualify הוא הפועל, qualified התואר.

definition: A period of work experience, often unpaid, for training purposes.
definitionHe: תקופת ניסיון עבודה, לעתים ללא תשלום, למטרות הכשרה.
examples: She completed a summer internship at Google.
The internship gave her valuable experience.
Many students apply for internships abroad.

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית אומרים do an internship (לא make).

tip: Use 'do an internship' or 'complete an internship' (not 'make'). An 'intern' is the person doing it.
tipHe: אומרים do an internship או complete an internship (לא make). intern הוא האדם שעושה את ההתמחות.

definition: An experienced person who advises and guides someone less experienced.
definitionHe: אדם מנוסה שמייעץ ומנחה מישהו פחות מנוסה.
examples: She found a mentor who helped her career.
Good mentors share their experience generously.
He has been a mentor to many young professionals.

commonMistakes.wrong: She is mentoring on her colleague
commonMistakes.explanation: mentor כפועל הוא transitivi - ישר בלי on: mentor someone.

tip: 'Mentor' can be both noun and verb. As a verb: 'mentor someone' (no preposition). The learner is a 'mentee'.
tipHe: mentor יכול להיות שם עצם ופועל. כפועל: mentor someone (ללא מילת יחס). הלומד הוא mentee.

definition: Working independently rather than being employed by a company.
definitionHe: עובד באופן עצמאי במקום להיות מועסק על ידי חברה.
examples: She works as a freelance designer.
Freelance work offers flexibility but less stability.
More people are choosing to go freelance.

commonMistakes.explanation: freelance הוא התואר. freelancer הוא שם עצם (האדם). לא אומרים freelancer worker.

tip: 'Freelance' = adjective (freelance writer). 'Freelancer' = noun (the person). Don't combine: 'freelancer worker'.
tipHe: freelance = תואר (freelance writer). freelancer = שם עצם (האדם). אל תשלבו: freelancer worker.

definition: A person who starts and runs their own business.
definitionHe: אדם שמקים ומנהל עסק משלו.
examples: The entrepreneur raised millions for her startup.
Entrepreneurs take risks to build new businesses.
He became a successful entrepreneur at age 25.

commonMistakes.explanation: שים לב לאיות: entrepreneur (מצרפתית, איות מורכב).

tip: Tricky spelling from French: 'entrepreneur'. The adjective is 'entrepreneurial'. Remember: entre-pre-neur.
tipHe: איות מורכב מצרפתית: entrepreneur. התואר: entrepreneurial. זכרו: entre-pre-neur.

definition: To discuss something formally to reach an agreement.
definitionHe: לדון במשהו באופן רשמי כדי להגיע להסכמה.
examples: They negotiated a better salary.
The two sides are negotiating a peace deal.
She negotiated the terms of the contract.

commonMistakes.explanation: negotiate הוא transitivi ישירות - negotiate something (ללא about).

tip: 'Negotiate' is transitive: 'negotiate a deal/price/contract' (no 'about'). The noun is 'negotiation'.
tipHe: negotiate הוא יוצא: negotiate a deal/price/contract (ללא about). שם העצם: negotiation.

definition: To work together with others on a project or task.
definitionHe: לעבוד יחד עם אחרים על פרויקט או משימה.
examples: The two companies collaborated on the research.
She collaborated with artists from around the world.
They collaborated to solve the problem.

commonMistakes.explanation: collaborated כבר אומר לעבוד ביחד, together מיותר (pleonasm).

tip: 'Collaborate' already means 'work together' - adding 'together' is redundant. The noun is 'collaboration'.
tipHe: collaborate כבר אומר לעבוד ביחד - הוספת together מיותרת. שם העצם: collaboration.

definition: The activity of building professional relationships.
definitionHe: הפעילות של בניית קשרים מקצועיים.
examples: Networking is essential for career growth.
She attended the event for networking purposes.
Professional networking helped him find a new job.

commonMistakes.wrong: She did networkings at the conference
commonMistakes.correct: She did networking at the conference
commonMistakes.explanation: networking היא לא-ספירה - אין צורת רבים.

tip: 'Networking' is uncountable - no plural form. Use 'do networking' or better: 'network' as a verb.
tipHe: networking היא לא-ספירה - אין צורת רבים. אומרים do networking או עדיף: network כפועל.

definition: The ability to do something successfully or efficiently.
definitionHe: היכולת לעשות משהו בהצלחה או ביעילות.
examples: He demonstrated competence in all areas.
Technical competence is required for this role.
Her competence was recognized by management.

commonMistakes.explanation: עם competence אומרים strong/high (לא good).

tip: Use 'strong/high competence' (not 'good'). 'Competent' is the adjective: 'She is competent'.
tipHe: אומרים strong/high competence (לא good). competent הוא התואר: She is competent.

definition: An assessment of the value or quality of something or someone's work.
definitionHe: הערכת ערך או איכות של משהו או של עבודת מישהו.
examples: The annual appraisal determines salary increases.
She received a positive performance appraisal.
Property appraisals help determine market value.

commonMistakes.explanation: appraise הוא פועל. שם העצם הוא appraisal.

tip: 'Appraise' = verb (to evaluate). 'Appraisal' = noun (the evaluation). Don't confuse with 'apprise' (to inform).
tipHe: appraise = פועל (להעריך). appraisal = שם עצם (הערכה). אל תבלבלו עם apprise (להודיע).

definition: A trial period during which a new employee is assessed.
definitionHe: תקופת ניסיון שבה עובד חדש מוערך.
examples: New employees are on probation for three months.
She passed her probation period successfully.
During probation, performance is closely monitored.

commonMistakes.explanation: אומרים on probation (לא in probation).

tip: Use 'on probation' (not 'in'). Note: 'probation' also means a period of supervised release in criminal law.
tipHe: אומרים on probation (לא in). הערה: probation גם אומר תקופת שחרור מפוקח במשפט הפלילי.

definition: The latest time or date by which something must be completed.
definitionHe: הזמן או התאריך האחרון שבו משהו חייב להיות מוגמר.
examples: The deadline for the project is next Friday.
She always meets her deadlines.
Can we extend the deadline by a week?

commonMistakes.explanation: באנגלית משתמשים ב-on לפני ימי השבוע (on Friday), לא in.

tip: Use 'on' before days (on Friday, on Monday). Use 'in' for months/years (in January, in 2024).
tipHe: משתמשים ב-on לפני ימים (on Friday, on Monday). משתמשים ב-in לחודשים/שנים (in January, in 2024).
